title: Startup Founder Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Startup Founder Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Dark high-contrast noir ink portrait of an adult East Asian male startup founder with short slightly messy hair and sharp cheekbones, built around three-quarter view, eyes looking directly at camera, one hand adjusting a dark coat collar, calm but intense expression and Dark, high-contrast noir-style portrait of SUBJECT, drawn entirely with bold black ink lines and deliberate splatter. Subject: an adult East Asian male startup founder with short slightly messy hair and sharp cheekbones is the single portrait subject, defined through bold black ink linework, sharp silhouette, controlled expression, and graphic-novel intensity. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed close editorial portrait composition with strong three-quarter or profile head-and-shoulder focus, dramatic shadow grouping, readable facial planes, and deliberate splatter around the silhouette. Signature Elements: Black ink linework, deliberate splatter, deep shadows, carved white highlights, paper texture, brooding cinematic expression, and the feeling of the most gripping panel in a graphic novel. Style: Noir-style graphic novel portrait drawn entirely with bold black ink lines, deliberate ink splatter, deep shadow blocks, bright highlights carved from empty white paper, subtle paper grain, brooding cinematic mood, and intense panel-like storytelling. Color Palette: Strict black ink, paper white, and minimal grey paper-grain variation only; contrast comes from shadow shape, white-space highlights, and controlled splatter density. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Bold ink strokes, dry paper grain, rough splatter edges, white negative space, and crisp brush-line weight variation. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
